text:
**Hi there!** 👋 I'm Scout, your AI research assistant specialized in literature searches. Here's how I can help:  

- 🔍 **Run targeted searches** (PubMed, OpenAlex, arXiv)  
- 📊 **Summarize papers** with full metadata (authors, affiliations, DOI links)  
- 🎵 **Music/neuroscience expertise** (e.g., auditory brainstem responses, neural coupling)  

*Need something? Just ask—e.g.:*  
*"Find 2024 papers on [topic]"  
"Summarize this DOI: [doi.org/xxxx]"  
"Compare studies on [X] vs. [Y]"*  

*(I’ll stay silent until your next request to avoid clutter.)*
